name: NC Birth Weight by Smoking (2004)
description: Birth weights (lbs) of babies born to smokers vs. nonsmokers in North Carolina, 2004. IMS Ch. 20.
studyDescription: An observational study of 1,000 births recorded in North Carolina in 2004. Mothers were classified as smokers or nonsmokers based on self-report. Birth weight was recorded for each baby.

variableDescriptions.group: Whether the mother was a smoker or nonsmoker during pregnancy
variableDescriptions.weight: Birth weight of the baby in pounds

sourceDetail: OpenIntro IMS Ch. 20. Data from the North Carolina State Center for Health Statistics birth records, 2004.

context.nullClaim: there is no difference in mean birth weight between babies of smokers and nonsmokers

inferenceContexts.parameter: the difference in population mean birth weight between nonsmokers and smokers
inferenceContexts.claim: there is a difference in average birth weight between babies born to nonsmokers and smokers
